name: Closing Cash Balance Calculation
short_description: Calculates the closing cash balance at the end of a period by summing the opening balance with net cash flows from operating, investing, and financing activities.

inputs.name: company_name
inputs.description: Name of the company for which the balance is calculated.

inputs.name: opening_balance
inputs.description: The cash balance at the beginning of the period.

inputs.name: net_operating_cash
inputs.description: Net cash flow from operating activities.

inputs.name: net_investing_cash
inputs.description: Net cash flow from investing activities (can be an inflow or outflow).

inputs.name: net_financing_cash
inputs.description: Net cash flow from financing activities (can be an inflow or outflow).

name: Tax Cash Outflow
short_description: Calculates the actual cash outflow for taxes based on income tax expense and the changes in taxes payable throughout the year.

inputs.name: tax_expense
inputs.description: Income tax expense for the period.

inputs.name: opening_taxes_payable
inputs.description: Taxes payable at the beginning of the period.

inputs.name: closing_taxes_payable
inputs.description: Taxes payable at the end of the period.

name: Indirect Method: Cash Flow from Operations (Advanced with Amortization)
short_description: Calculates cash flow from operating activities using the indirect method, starting with net income and adjusting for depreciation, amortization, and changes in various working capital accounts.

inputs.name: net_income
inputs.description: Net income for the period

inputs.name: depreciation
inputs.description: Depreciation expense for the period

inputs.name: amortization
inputs.description: Amortization expense for the period

inputs.name: increase_receivable
inputs.description: Increase in accounts receivable

inputs.name: increase_inventory
inputs.description: Increase in inventory

inputs.name: decrease_payable
inputs.description: Decrease in accounts payable

inputs.name: increase_accrued_expenses
inputs.description: Increase in accrued expenses

name: Cash Flow from Financing Activities
short_description: A company calculates its net cash flow from financing activities by summing up the inflows from issuing equity and debt and subtracting the outflows from debt repayments and dividend payments.

inputs.name: equity_issuance
inputs.description: Cash received from issuing new equity.

inputs.name: debt_issuance
inputs.description: Cash received from issuing new debt.

inputs.name: debt_repayment
inputs.description: Cash paid for repaying existing debt.

inputs.name: dividends_paid
inputs.description: Cash paid out as dividends to shareholders.

name: Cash Flow Impact of Acquisition
short_description: Evaluates the net cash flow impact of an acquisition over a four-year period, considering acquisition cost, annual synergies, and integration costs.

inputs.name: acquisition_cost
inputs.description: The initial cost of the acquisition

inputs.name: synergies1
inputs.description: Expected synergy benefit in year 1

inputs.name: synergies2
inputs.description: Expected synergy benefit in year 2

inputs.name: synergies3
inputs.description: Expected synergy benefit in year 3

inputs.name: synergies4
inputs.description: Expected synergy benefit in year 4

inputs.name: integration_cost1
inputs.description: Integration cost in year 1

inputs.name: integration_cost2
inputs.description: Integration cost in year 2
